localInvariants.reason: Delegate child sessions must not register AgentMemory tools, hooks, or bundled skills
Headless sessions must not crash when status UI is absent
Bearer secrets must not be silently sent over non-loopback plaintext HTTP
Durable memory writes must reject obvious secret-looking content
Curated MCP-compatible wrappers must use the upstream MCP REST bridge
Gated AgentMemory wrappers must stay default-off behind explicit local opt-in
Local confirmation fields must be validated and stripped before forwarding upstream
AgentMemory workflow/task-state tools must remain not exposed unless Pi accepts an ADR for that role
AgentMemory external integration tools must remain not exposed unless there is an active client/workflow policy
The AgentMemory skill must stay bundled beside the extension
AgentMemory status text shape must remain stable unless intentionally changed
